reference_answer: Archive steward Mina Rao held custody of archive carton A-204.
Keeper Sol Chen filed official archive register AR-77 on 2026-03-12.
SN-4 suggested allowing the former officer to view the photographs in the office, but not remove them.
DR-11 stayed draft because it was pending a board vote.
Co-op records bylaw B-2 governed tenant-record cartons.
The board voted 6-1 to keep the originals in carton A-204 and allow only supervised inspection copies.
MO-9 confirmed that the former officer could view the tenant photographs but could not remove them from archive custody.
DC-20 controlled later removal requests and required a separate written release naming each photograph.
NL-8 was noncontrolling because it copied draft recommendation DR-11 and omitted the later board vote.
Archive steward Mina Rao controlled access to carton A-204 during office hours.
